metrics.name: academorix.approvals.instances.total
metrics.description: Total approval instances created + transitioned. Status labels: pending → increment on ApprovalRequested; approved → increment on ApprovalGranted; executed → increment on ApprovalExecuted; rejected → ApprovalRejected; expired → ApprovalExpired; cancelled → ApprovalCancelled.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.instances.pending_count
metrics.description: Current count of pending instances. Feeds capacity + SLA dashboards.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.decisions.total
metrics.description: Total approve + reject decisions. `was_delegated` labels distinguish direct decisions from delegate-substituted ones.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.decisions.time_to_first_decision_ms
metrics.description: ApprovalRequested → first ApprovalDecisionRecorded. 60s → 7 days buckets. P50 target < 4h; P95 target < 24h. Above the target = approval-flow bottleneck.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.decisions.time_to_final_ms
metrics.description: ApprovalRequested → status transition to approved/rejected/expired. P50 approved < 8h; P95 < 3 days. Approval-SLA report metric.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.instances.expiry_rate
metrics.description: Rolling 7-day ratio: expired / (approved + rejected + expired + cancelled). High expiry_rate signals under-resourced approver pool OR mis-set expires_after_hours. Alert at > 0.10.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.instances.approval_rate
metrics.description: Rolling 30-day ratio: approved / (approved + rejected). Sanity metric — extreme values (near 0 or 1) hint at over-restrictive templates or missing approver oversight.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.executor.duration_ms
metrics.description: ApprovalInstanceExecutor::dispatch() duration. outcome: success | failed. Feeds ApprovalExecutionFailedNotification P0 alerts when duration > 30s or outcome=failed.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.executor.wedged_count
metrics.description: Current count of status='approved' AND executed_at IS NULL AND updated_at > 1h ago instances. Alert immediately at > 0 — human intervention required.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.expression.duration_ms
metrics.description: Expression evaluation timing. type: when_expression | selector_expression. Enforce hard timeout at 250ms (config approvals.expression.timeout_ms) — histogram surfaces the tail.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.expression.evaluation_total
metrics.description: Expression evaluation counter. outcome: success | parse_error | runtime_error | timeout | invalid_return_type.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.expression.cache_hit_ratio
metrics.description: Rolling ratio of expression evaluations that hit the compiled-AST cache vs recompiled. Target > 0.95 in steady state.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.selector.evaluation_failures
metrics.description: Cumulative ApproverSelectorEvaluationFailed events. Alert at > 5 in 15 minutes — template misconfiguration or delegation-index corruption.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.selector.resolved_approver_count
metrics.description: Histogram of resolved_approver counts per group. Extremes surface template design issues (1 → single point of failure; 100 → over-broad selector).

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.reminders.dispatched_total
metrics.description: Total reminders sent. channel: mail | in_app | push. reminder_number: 1 | 2 | 3 (or max_reminders).

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.jobs.sweep.duration_ms
metrics.description: Sweep-job durations. job: expire_overdue | dispatch_reminders | reconcile_versions | purge_expired. Alert at duration > job's cron interval (job can't keep up).

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.jobs.sweep.processed_total
metrics.description: Rows the sweep-job touched. outcome: transitioned | skipped | errored.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.templates.total
metrics.description: Current active + inactive templates across all tenants. Feeds capacity planning for the platform-level template-versioning storage.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.templates.version_bumps_total
metrics.description: Version-bumps per action_key. Governance-change velocity metric — a spike may indicate a tenant iterating a template.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.security.violations
metrics.description: Cumulative ApprovalSecurityViolation events. Any non-zero increment alerts to #security-alerts. Types: forged_decision | direct_db_write | restricted_context_leak | quorum_evaluation_bypass.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.delegation.substitutions_total
metrics.description: Cumulative DelegationSubstitutedApprover events. Baseline metric — spikes correlate with OOF season for a tenant.

metrics.name: academorix.approvals.presenter.projection_duration_ms
metrics.description: ApprovalPresenter projection latency. shape: instance | template | audit_report. Bottleneck surface for the tenant admin dashboard.
